tools.name: search_my_notes
tools.description: Search through personal digital notes and documents using semantic search. Use this to find information about past projects, personal thoughts, or specific facts stored in the user's data folder. You can optionally filter by a specific filename.

query.description: The natural language search query or question.

filename.description: Optional: The specific filename (e.g., 'note1.txt') to restrict the search to.

tools.name: get_alerts
tools.description: Get active weather alerts for a US state

state.description: Two-letter US state code (e.g., CA, TX)

tools.name: get_forecast
tools.description: Get weather forecast for a location
